prompt: Compare each detected car in the source (regardless of color) with the reference car and flag mismatches by outlining them in yellow.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays multiple parked cars on a street. Using image 2, a blue Peugeot 206, as the sole reference car model, identify all cars in image 1. For every car in image 1 that does not match the model of the Peugeot 206 in image 2, draw a clear yellow outline around it. Ensure the comparison is based purely on the car's model, ignoring its color.
objects: white car with yellow outline (front left)
silver hatchback car with yellow outline
white hatchback car with yellow outline
purple/grey sedan car with yellow outline
dark sedan car with yellow outline
clear yellow outlines around non-Peugeot 206 car models
